summary: W946 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while consolidating W945 separate W716 boundary data and W717 relation data leaves into the existing W730 boundary/relation provider. The route projects W730 back into W945 and delegates through the W945 and earlier closed-map route stack. Product success remains false because W946 leaves are still explicit assumptions, and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W946 refines W945 by replacing W716 boundary data and W717 relation data fields with a W730 boundary/relation provider, while that provider and the rest of the W946 leaves are still not instantiated.

W946 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W946 fields include W730 boundary/relation data, W944 target no-univ data, W725 closedness branch data, W719 normalized fixed-target data, W722 source-triangulation data, one endpoint strictShortExact witness field, and W945 localized-unit data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract product-success evidence, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
